title: Add human tree root history buffer matching agent tree's 30-root buffer

artifacts.description: Add ROOT_HISTORY_SIZE=30 circular buffer for humanTree roots, uint256[30] humanRootHistory and uint32 humanRootIndex state vars, push new root on enrollment, and expose isKnownHumanRoot(bytes32) view function
Update verifyHandshake() to call isKnownHumanRoot(humanMerkleRoot) instead of checking only the current humanTree root, mirroring the existing isKnownAgentRoot() pattern

Add test cases: (1) proof generated before enrollment still passes within 30-root window, (2) proof generated before 31st enrollment fails (root evicted), (3) proof against current root always passes, (4) isKnownHumanRoot returns false for unknown root

Add paragraph to Security Considerations section describing humanTree root staleness window: provers have a window of up to ROOT_HISTORY_SIZE (30) enrollments before their cached root is evicted; implementations SHOULD re-fetch the current root if proof generation is delayed

Document the breaking behavior change: humanTree root checks now use 30-root history buffer, matching agentTree parity; verifyHandshake no longer rejects in-flight proofs during concurrent enrollments

steps: Inspect contracts/src/IdentityRegistry.sol to locate the existing agentTree ROOT_HISTORY_SIZE pattern, isKnownAgentRoot(), and verifyHandshake() to understand exact variable names and slot layout
Add uint256 constant ROOT_HISTORY_SIZE_HUMAN = 30 (or reuse the existing ROOT_HISTORY_SIZE constant if already defined globally)
Add state variables: bytes32[30] public humanRootHistory and uint32 public humanRootIndex (use uint32 to match agentRootIndex type if present)
In the enrollment function (enrollHuman or equivalent), after updating the humanTree Merkle root, push the new root into humanRootHistory[humanRootIndex % 30] and increment humanRootIndex
Implement isKnownHumanRoot(bytes32 root) public view returns (bool) that iterates over humanRootHistory and returns true if root matches any entry (mirror isKnownAgentRoot logic exactly)
Update verifyHandshake(): replace require(humanTree.root == humanMerkleRoot) with require(isKnownHumanRoot(humanMerkleRoot), 'Unknown human root')
Run existing contract tests to confirm no regressions: npm run test:contracts
Add the four new test cases to contracts/test/IdentityRegistry.test.ts covering root window acceptance, eviction boundary, current-root pass, and unknown-root rejection
Run full test suite to confirm all pass: npm test
Update spec/draft-bolyra-mutual-zkp-auth-01.md Security Considerations with root staleness window documentation
Update contracts/CHANGELOG.md with the behavioral change note
Commit with DCO sign-off: git commit -s
dependencies: contracts/src/IdentityRegistry.sol — existing agentTree ROOT_HISTORY_SIZE and isKnownAgentRoot() pattern to mirror
contracts/test/IdentityRegistry.test.ts — existing test harness for verifyHandshake()
spec/draft-bolyra-mutual-zkp-auth-01.md — IETF draft Security Considerations section
Hardhat test environment with incremental enrollment support to simulate 30+ enrollments in tests
